title: GrantVoucherClaims
description: AITP v0.2 grant voucher — decoded JWS payload claims (RFC-AITP-0005 §8). On the wire a voucher is an opaque compact JWS string (typ 'aitp-grant+jwt'), minted by the TCT issuer at TCT issuance time and delivered alongside the TCT in MUTUAL_COMMIT / MUTUAL_COMMIT_ACK. It is the delegation authority source (RFC-AITP-0006); it replaces the v0.1 grant_proof. iss/sub/grants/iat/exp MUST equal the companion TCT's values and src_jti MUST equal its jti.

ver.description: Protocol version private claim. MUST be 'aitp/0.2'.

iss.description: AID of the TCT issuer. The voucher is signed by this key, and only this peer verifies it (during delegation verification, against its own key).

sub.description: AID of the TCT subject — the peer entitled to delegate against this voucher. MUST equal the outer delegation token's iss when embedded (RFC-AITP-0006 §4 step 4).

grants.description: MUST equal the companion TCT's grants. Delegated scope is checked as a subset of this list.

iat.description: Unix seconds. MUST equal the companion TCT's iat.

exp.description: Unix seconds. MUST equal the companion TCT's exp. Delegations derived from this voucher MUST NOT outlive it.

src_jti.description: The companion TCT's jti. Revocation linkage: revoking the TCT invalidates this voucher and every delegation derived from it (RFC-AITP-0008).

ext.description: Optional extension namespace per RFC-AITP-0001 §5.4.5 and RFC-AITP-0012. Unknown keys inside ext MUST be ignored; unknown claims outside it are rejected by this schema.
